avoidedCutsiteEnzymeIds.description: List of enzyme IDs whose recognition sites will be avoided when creating the optimized sequence.

codonUsageTableId.description: ID of the codon usage table representing the target organism.

dnaSequenceIds.description: IDs of DNA sequences to codon-optimize.

folderId.description: ID of the folder in which the optimized sequences will be saved.

gcContent.description: The amount of GC content in the optimized sequence. LOW is defined as below 0.33, MEDIUM as 0.33-0.66, and HIGH as above 0.66. If neither gcContent nor gcContentRange is specified, the optimization will default to ANY (0-1). Cannot be specified together with gcContentRange.

gcContentRange.description: Custom GC content range for the optimized sequence, specified as decimal values between 0 and 1. The maximum must be greater than the minimum. Cannot be specified together with gcContent.

hairpinParameters.description: These parameters are applied in the AvoidHairpins specification in DNAChisel. If hairpinParameters is not specified, hairpins will not be avoided.

method.description: The codon optimization algorithm to use. Requires codonUsageTableId to be specified. MATCH_CODON_USAGE selects codons probabilistically based on the organism's codon usage frequencies. USE_BEST_CODON always selects the most frequently used codon for each amino acid.

reducedPatterns.description: List of patterns to avoid when creating the optimized sequence, on the coding strand only.

schemaId.description: ID of the optimized DNA sequences' schemas

shouldDepleteUridine.description: If not specified, the optimization will default to false, and mRNA uridine depletion will not be performed.
